tierPerks.title: LEVEL UP TO UNLOCK
tierPerks.subtitle: When you reach {{tierName}} ({{xp}} XP), you'll receive:

help.title: Frequently Asked Questions
help.subtitle: Understand Bible Quiz to play more effectively

howToPlay.a: Begin with Practice mode — no time limit, no energy cost. Pick a Bible book, difficulty, question count, and start. Practice is the onboarding path; it doesn't grant XP directly. When you're ready for Ranked, complete the Bible Basics catechism (10 core doctrinal questions, score ≥8/10) to unlock it — passing once unlocks Ranked permanently. Ranked is where you earn XP toward your tier.

bibleTranslation.q: Which Bible translation does the app use?
bibleTranslation.a: English questions use the English Standard Version (ESV). Vietnamese uses the Revised Vietnamese Version 2011 (RVV11). Both are widely adopted Protestant translations — faithful to the original languages and accessible to modern readers.

changeLanguage.q: How do I switch question language between Vietnamese and English?
changeLanguage.a: Click your avatar (top right) → toggle VI/EN under the 'Questions' item. The change takes effect immediately — the next question renders in your chosen language. Switch anytime.

tierSystem.q: How does the tier system work?
tierSystem.a: Six tiers tracked by lifetime XP total: New Believer (0 XP) → Seeker (1,000) → Disciple (5,000) → Sage (15,000) → Prophet (40,000) → Apostle (100,000). Tiers only rise, never fall. Each tier scales 5 things at once: (1) mode unlocks — Ranked at T2, Tournament at T4; (2) Ranked XP multiplier: 1.0× → 1.1× → 1.2× → 1.3× → 1.5× → 2.0×; (3) Energy regen/hour: 20 → 22 → 25 → 28 → 30 → 35; (4) Streak Freezes/week: 1 (T1-T2) → 2 (T3-T4) → 3 (T5-T6); (5) Harder question mix + shorter timer — T1 has 70% easy/30s, T6 has 60% hard/18s. Cosmetics (avatar frames, quiz themes) also unlock by tier.

streakVsXp.q: How are Streak and XP different?
streakVsXp.a: They're two completely independent currencies. XP is the main progression lane — earned only from Ranked mode, determines your tier (1-6), unlocks new modes, scales rewards, drives leaderboard position, and unlocks cosmetics. Streak is an engagement reward — goes up when you play Ranked daily (and Daily Challenge soon), regardless of performance. You can have a high streak but low tier (faithful daily visitor not yet skilled at Ranked) or vice versa (skilled grinder who plays sporadically). Both have their own value: streak reflects faithful consistency, XP reflects Bible mastery.

howUnlockRanked.a: Complete the Bible Basics catechism — 10 core questions covering Christian doctrine (Trinity, attributes of God, Christology, salvation by grace, etc.). Score at least 8/10 to pass — passing once unlocks Ranked permanently. There's a 60-second cooldown between failed attempts. Once Ranked unlocks, XP starts accumulating toward the next tier.

howEarnXp.q: How do I earn XP and can I lose it?
howEarnXp.a: Two XP sources: (1) Ranked mode — Easy +8, Medium +12, Hard +18 per correct answer with speed + combo multipliers 1.2/1.5× (primary source, 100-500 XP/session). (2) Daily Challenge — +50 XP per completion, once per day (max 1,500 XP/month, gives casual users a reliable progression path). Practice and other modes don't grant XP — they contribute to history, streaks, and the early-unlock path. Wrong answers don't cost XP (they cost energy in Ranked). Lifetime XP only goes up.

practiceVsRanked.q: How is Practice different from Ranked?
practiceVsRanked.a: Practice: free, unlimited, pick any book/difficulty, shows explanations after each question, unlimited hints. Ranked: costs energy (5 per wrong answer), questions are random, no book selection, but only Ranked plays count toward the leaderboard. Practice to learn, Ranked to compete.

dailyStreak.q: How do Daily Challenge and Streak work?
dailyStreak.a: Daily Challenge: 5 fixed questions per day (same for everyone), once per day — creates a shared daily puzzle community. Streak: consecutive days played — increments by 1 each day you play Ranked mode. Miss 1 day → Streak Freeze auto-consumes (if available); miss 2+ days → streak resets to 1. Freeze count per week scales by tier: 1 freeze at T1-T2, 2 at T3-T4, 3 at T5-T6. Milestone badges planned: 7 days 'Diligent', 30 days 'Faithful', 100 days 'Patient as Job'. Note: Practice, Weekly, Mystery, Speed do NOT extend streak — only Ranked counts.

groupsTournament.q: What are Church Groups and Tournaments?
groupsTournament.a: Church Groups: join or create a group around your congregation/cell, with a group-only leaderboard, play alongside fellow believers. Tournaments: 1v1 bracket elimination, requires Sage tier or above. Group leaders can organize private tournaments for their members.

energySystem.q: How does the energy system (⚡) work?
energySystem.a: You get 100 energy per day. Ranked costs 5 energy per wrong answer (correct = free). When energy runs out you can't play Ranked — switch to Practice (free) or wait for midnight reset. Regen scales with tier: New Believer 20/hour, Sage 28/hour, Apostle 35/hour.

lifelines.q: When and how can I use Hints (Lifelines)?
lifelines.a: During a quiz, press the 💡 Hint button to eliminate one wrong option. Practice: unlimited. Ranked: 2 per session. Multiplayer/Tournament: disabled (fair play). The algorithm is smart — it eliminates the least-chosen wrong answer first, keeping the strong distractor to train your judgment.

dataPrivacy.a: Your detailed answers and session history are visible only to you. Publicly displayed: name, avatar, tier, total XP (on leaderboard). NOT displayed: email, per-question answers, wrong/right history. We don't share data with third parties. Full details in the Privacy Policy linked from the footer.

deleteAccount.q: How do I delete my account and data?
deleteAccount.a: Go to Profile → scroll to the bottom → tap 'Delete account'. All progress, sessions, and answers will be permanently erased within 7 days. Your name disappears from the leaderboard immediately. This action is NOT reversible. If you just want a break, simply stop logging in — data stays.
